decisions.briefing: Markets were flat to slightly negative today (NASDAQ -0.0%, S&P 500 -0.2%), a neutral session with no clear risk-on catalyst. Despite several high-scoring candidates (IREN, CIFR, NUVB, VSXY, PTON) showing full multi-signal confirmation, we're holding cash and existing positions rather than forcing a buy, per the lesson that capital deployment should wait for a genuine risk-on trigger rather than a neutral day.

market_education.summary_en: Major indices traded essentially flat today, with the S&P 500 dipping modestly and the NASDAQ roughly unchanged. There was no single dominant catalyst driving the tape, suggesting investors are in a wait-and-see mode after recent gains. Volume and volatility remained subdued, consistent with a consolidation phase rather than a directional breakout.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢大致持平，標普500指數小幅下跌，納指則幾乎沒有變動。市場缺乏明確的主導消息面，顯示投資者在近期漲勢後轉為觀望。成交量與波動度均維持在較低水平，符合盤整格局而非明確的方向性突破。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sometimes the best move is no move at all. Even when you have cash available and stocks that look technically strong, it can pay to wait for a clearer market signal (like a strong up day) before committing new money, rather than buying just because you can.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 有時候，最好的操作就是按兵不動。即使手上有現金、也有技術面看起來不錯的股票，等待更明確的市場訊號（例如大盤明顯上漲的一天）再進場，往往比單純因為「有錢可以買」就出手更為穩健。
